sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Box, Paper, Typography, Grid, Divider, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Button, } from '@mui/material'; import { Print } from '@mui/icons-material'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const SalesPrint = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [invoice, setInvoice] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { // Get the invoice data from window (set when printing) const data = window.printSaleData; if (data) { setInvoice(data); } else { // If no data, redirect back navigate('/sales/list'); } }, [navigate]); const handlePrint = () => { window.print(); }; if (!invoice) { return ( Loading invoice... ); } return ( {/* Invoice Header */} 📦 Inventory Pro 123 Business Street, City - 400001 GST: GST123456789 Phone: +91 9876543210 TAX INVOICE Invoice No: {invoice.invoiceNo} Date: {new Date(invoice.invoiceDate).toLocaleDateString()} Payment: {invoice.paymentType} {/* Customer Details */} Bill To: {invoice.customerName} Phone: {invoice.customerPhone || 'N/A'} Invoice Details: Status: {invoice.isReturned ? 'Returned' : 'Active'} Payment Type: {invoice.paymentType} {invoice.referenceNo && ( Reference: {invoice.referenceNo} )} {/* Items Table */} # Item Code Qty Rate Discount Tax Amount {invoice.items.map((item, index) => ( {index + 1} {item.itemName} {item.itemCode} {item.quantity} ₹{item.unitPrice.toFixed(2)} {item.discountPercent}% {item.taxPercent}% ₹{item.totalAmount.toFixed(2)} ))}
{/* Summary */} Subtotal ₹{invoice.totalAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} Discount -₹{invoice.discountAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} Tax +₹{invoice.taxAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} Total ₹{invoice.netAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} Paid ₹{invoice.paidAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} Balance 0 ? 'warning.main' : 'success.main'}> ₹{invoice.balanceAmount?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} {invoice.notes && ( Notes: {invoice.notes} )} {/* Footer */} Thank you for your business! This is a computer-generated invoice. No signature required. ); }; export default SalesPrint;
